feature_descriptions.announce_flag: boolean: announce_peer (this host is sharing content)
feature_descriptions.distinct_info_hashes: distinct info_hashes queried / announced per source over the window
feature_descriptions.distinct_peers: distinct DHT peers contacted per source over the window (fanout)
feature_descriptions.node_id_entropy: Shannon entropy of the node id
feature_descriptions.request_rate: DHT messages per source over the window
feature_descriptions.request_type: encoded DHT query (ping / find_node / get_peers / announce_peer)

schema_description: (batch) Suricata BitTorrent DHT set: query type, peer/info-hash fanout, client and node-id features
